title: Mourning-Death Clan
content:
The 
Mourning-Death Clan
 is a foreign clan that was enslaved by the Immortal Ancestor to serve the Immortal Astral Continent's Immortal royal family. The Immortals' Imperial Teacher is part of this clan.

History
[
]

This clan came from beyond the Immortal Astral Continent and were enslaved by the Immortal Ancestor. They're also the origin of Joss Flames. Seeking freedom, they set up a plan involving Wang Lin.

Empyrean Exalt Hai Zi is currently the only known living member of this clan in the Immortal Astral Continent.

Note
[
]

It is currently (and hopefully temporarily) translated as 
Dao Wang Clan
 in the official translation.

Trivia
[
]

Spoilers

- This clan appears in Pursuit of the Truth and is mentioned in I Shall Seal the Heavens

Pursuit of the Truth Spoiler:                                        
- They originated from one of the races in Pursuit of the Truth in which this clan was exiled from the world MC reside.

I Shall Seal The Heaven Spoiler:                                   
- Shui Dongliu was said to be the mixture of this clan and Nine Seals’s discarnate soul.
